segment_name: 创意机构老板 - 增长导向
segment_logic: Contacts where persona = Creative Agency Owner and lifecycle_stage in subscriber, lead
primary_goal: 展示自动化如何改善交付能力、利润率和客户保留

persona: Operations Manager at a Small Agency
segment_name: 机构运营 - 工作流效率
segment_logic: Contacts where persona = Operations Manager at a Small Agency and lifecycle_stage in subscriber, lead
primary_goal: 展示结构化工作流如何减少交接摩擦和报告开销

segment_name: 自由创意工作者 - 生产力
segment_logic: Contacts where persona = Freelance Creative Professional and lifecycle_stage in subscriber, lead
primary_goal: 展示自动化如何帮助独立创意工作者更快地重复利用工作，而不失质量
